creator: hans@nordhaug.priv.no
text:
Currently you can select between postfix-2.11.3_2 and postfix-tls-2.11.3_2, but there is no postfix-tls-sasl2-2.11.3_2.

This means that if you use Cyrus SASL with Postfix, you can't use pkg. See also https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/pkgng-usage-problem-with-postfix-options-sasl-tls.46220/

Please consider building also this version of postfix.

PS! For reference: The error you see /var/log/maillog is: "warning: smtpd_sasl_auth_enable is true, but SASL support is not compiled in"
